mapper.sql: SELECT ID, CONTRACT_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, PAYMENT_TYPE_NAME, PAYMENT_DAYS, RATE, TAX, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, "TYPE", RATE_ID, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TRATE_ITEM_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE where CONTRACT_ID = #{contractId}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, CONTRACT_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, PAYMENT_TYPE_NAME, PAYMENT_DAYS, RATE, TAX, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, "TYPE", RATE_ID, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TRATE_ITEM_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE( ID, CONTRACT_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, PAYMENT_TYPE_NAME, PAYMENT_DAYS, RATE, TAX, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, "TYPE", RATE_ID, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TRATE_ITEM_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contractId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateItemCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateItemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceContentId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceContentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentDays, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tax, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{freeStorageDays,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{trateItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE SET CONTRACT_ID = #{contractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_NAME = #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE_ITEM_CODE = #{rateItemCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE_ITEM_NAME = #{rateItemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID = #{serviceContentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME = #{serviceContentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE = #{paymentTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAYMENT_TYPE_NAME = #{paymentTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAYMENT_DAYS = #{paymentDays,jdbcType=BIGINT}, RATE = #{rate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TAX = #{tax, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, UNIT_CODE = #{unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UNIT_NAME = #{unitName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}, RATE_ID = #{rateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, "TYPE" = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS = #{freeStorageDays,jdbcType=INTEGER}, TRATE_ITEM_ID = #{trateItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, PROCESS_CODE = #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROCESS_NAME = #{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}
